name: top-paper-mcp-server
description: Search academic papers from arXiv and top conferences (CVPR, NeurIPS, ICLR, ICML, etc.), download full text via MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Search and analyze academic papers from top conferences.
interface.longDescription: Adds paper search and download capabilities from arXiv and top AI/ML/CV conferences (CVPR, ICCV, NeurIPS, ICLR, ICML, AAAI, IJCAI, ECCV) to Codex-compatible MCP clients.
